ocr_findings.description: '試験にはコレが出る！' rendered as '試験にはつしが出る！' — the コレ icon text is misread as hiragana つし throughout the document. Affects the callout box label.

JANコード table: first column (containing the barcode image) is empty in OCR, and the three numbered rows (①メーカコード, ②商品アイテムコード, ③チェックディジット) are present but the image+label layout is lost. '## チェックディジット' heading is spurious — it is not a section heading in the image, just part of the table continuation.
QRコード table renders as a malformed pipe-separated block with bullet text inside the cell rather than a clean two-column layout.
Ruby furigana 'ジャン' over JANコード and 'キューアール' over QRコード in image not captured in OCR — cosmetic.

reviewer_notes: JAN/QRコード explanation page with tables and summary box. Main body text is faithfully reproduced. Two med-severity issues: the icon label misread and the JANコード table structure is degraded with a spurious heading. No content is lost entirely but table semantics are impaired.
